notes: Solid Frogger implementation with all core mechanics (road, river, home bays, lives, levels, timer), good frog sprite and vehicle rendering, but river object wrapping can cause brief gaps leaving frog stranded mid-river, and the prevKeys edge-detection has a subtle bug where prevKeys is updated after keydown fires making it unreliable.

Looks recognizably like Frogger, but core input is badly broken by the prevKeys edge-detection logic so movement effectively only works once per key, which severely damages functionality and playability.
